KEY: E major | METER: 4/4 | TEMPO: 200 | GRID: 16th (adaptive) | BARS: 136
VOICES: 0276DREA[drums], 0276DREA#2[prog=62], 0276DREA#3[prog=61], 0276DREA#4[prog=39], 0276DREA#5[prog=53], 0276DREA#6[prog=24], 0276DREA#7[prog=52], 0276DREA#8[prog=27], 0276DREA#9[prog=30], 0276DREA#10[prog=65], 0276DREA#11[prog=119], 0276DREA#12[prog=65], 0276DREA#13[prog=65]

@3 [-]
@4 [B] (grid:12t)
  0276DREA   : C2@4>1^104
  0276DREA#2 : D#4+F#4+B4@4>7^104 E4+G#4+B4@11>1^104
  0276DREA#3 : D#5+D#6@4>7^104 E5+E6@11>1^104
@5 [B | G#m7] (grid:12t)
  0276DREA   : G#4@12>1^56
